name: GT-hyp
source: GIVEN HYPOTHESES and CONSTRUCTIONS of the theorem (the contract's standing assumptions; not a refs quote, not an import). Phi unital positive on B(H)_sa; ||Phi^2-Phi||<=eta<=eta_0; P=theta(2Phi-1); A=Im P (so P(a)=a for a in A); omega a faithful state on B(H) with ||omega∘Phi-omega||<=eta and density rho_omega>=lambda 1, lambda in (0,1]; q_a=P(a^2)-a^2 in Ker P; h_{a,b}=a∘b-P(a∘b)=-q_{a,b}; a,b in A. WLOG lambda<=1.
